title: A route cannot silently migrate across network snapshots
purpose: Reject a saved route when its movement IDs belong to a different topology snapshot and no reviewed migration exists.

limitations: Synthetic snapshots model a facility change without claiming a real effective date.

then.subject: compiler.error_codes
then.rationale: A route built for retired topology must be revalidated rather than silently rewritten.

then.subject: compiler.substituted_movement_ids
then.rationale: An unreviewed movement substitution can change the intended road experience or create an unsafe instruction.
